error_signature: total record count not returned in response body
title: Total record count not available for custom pagination
symptom: When implementing custom backend pagination with Supabase, the total record count is not returned in the response body, causing issues with the paginator component.
applies_when: Using Supabase with custom backend pagination
Need total record count for paginator
not_this_if: Using Supabase plugin with built-in pagination
root_cause: Supabase's PostgREST API returns the total record count in the response headers instead of the body, which is incompatible with the paginator component that requires the count to be part of the response data.
fix_steps: Create a stored procedure in Supabase that returns the row count along with the table data.
Use the stored procedure in the Weweb endpoint to fetch data with the total count.
Set up the paginator component to use the total_rows column from the stored procedure.
agent_instruction: Implement a stored procedure in Supabase to return the total record count with the data for pagination.
